notes: The preset comparison evaluates each geometry by applying it to the current sector segments, creating matching preview terrain zones, and summarizing fire, cover, mobility risk, support, average score, weakest score, and recommended doctrine.
The current active-front seed gives high scores to most geometry presets because trench and facility coverage are broad; the comparison still exposes weaker minimum score on wide_screen.
